overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 exploring a high-tech netrunner apartment. The player moves through a neon-lit interior featuring a wall of computer monitors, holographic news displays, and a lounge bar area with floating advertisements. The environment features prominent cyan and magenta neon lighting with futuristic cyberpunk aesthetics.

scene_state.functional_zone: netrunner computer workstation with multiple monitors

agents.ego_description: walking slowly along the computer wall, observing the array of glowing monitors and technical equipment

entered.detail: large curved wall covered with multiple cyan-lit computer monitors displaying data and interfaces
high-tech office chair positioned in front of the computer desk
tall rack of server hardware with glowing blue indicator lights
purple neon light strips illuminating the ceiling and walls

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit cyberpunk apartment focused on a massive curved wall of computer monitors. The player approaches the workstation, revealing server racks on the left and an office chair on the right, all bathed in purple neon light.

scene_state.functional_zone: news terminal with detailed article display

events.description: camera focuses closely on the 54 News display showing 'Meatman Strikes Again' headline and weather widget

agents.ego_description: examining the news screen closely, reading the article details and checking the time and weather display

entered.detail: large curved monitor displaying 54 News channel with 'Meatman Strikes Again' article and 73°F weather widget

segments.scene_description: The camera closes in on a specific monitor displaying a news broadcast. The screen shows detailed article text about 'Meatman Strikes Again' alongside a weather widget indicating 06:49 time and 73°F temperature, while the surrounding monitors fade to peripheral view.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition corridor between computer station and lounge

events.description: moving away from the computer workstation toward the lounge area with glass partitions

agents.ego_description: turning away from the monitors and walking toward the lounge area, passing glass partitions

notable_agents.action: standing near the glass partition looking out toward the city lights

entered.detail: large glass window separating the computer area from the lounge, showing city lights outside
secondary workstation with monitors and office equipment
illuminated bar counter with neon lighting visible in the distance
red neon lighting running along the ceiling edges

segments.scene_description: The player turns away from the computer station and moves through a glass-walled corridor toward a lounge area. Red neon strips illuminate the ceiling as the camera approaches a bar area, where an NPC stands silhouetted against the window looking out at the city.

scene_state.functional_zone: lounge bar with holographic advertising displays

events.description: interaction prompt appears for 'MONOWIRE (STELLA)' item on the bar counter

agents.ego_description: approaching the bar counter and examining the holographic advertisements floating above

notable_agents.action: seated on the lounge furniture near the bar, illuminated by purple neon light

entered.detail: floating holographic screens displaying rotating advertisements including 'REAL WATER' and other products
long bar counter with glowing edge lighting and items placed on top
modern couch and seating area with quilted purple upholstery

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals a stylish lounge bar with floating holographic advertisements rotating in the air. The player approaches the counter where an interaction prompt appears for an item pickup. Purple neon lights illuminate the quilted lounge seating where an NPC rests, creating a moody cyberpunk atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a high-tech netrunner apartment that shifts from a focused workstation into a moody, neon-lit lounge. It begins in a dimly lit space, approaching a massive curved wall of computer monitors flanked by server racks and an office chair under purple neon light. As the camera closes in on a specific screen, the surrounding monitors fade into the periphery to highlight a detailed news broadcast about Meatman and a local weather widget. The scene then shifts as the player turns away from the station, moving through a glass-walled corridor illuminated by red ceiling strips toward a bar area where an NPC stands silhouetted against the city skyline. Finally, the view opens into a stylish lounge featuring rotating holographic advertisements and quilted seating, ending as the camera approaches the counter for an item pickup.
